title: Sophisticated Storage Create Integration
description: Full Featured Sophisticated Storage on Create Contraptions
body:
Sophisticated Storage Create Integration is a full-featured integration with Create, making it possible to use Sophisticated Storage blocks on Create contraptions not only as simple storage blocks, but with all of their extensive inventory options and with almost all upgrades fully functional. This addon mod brings the power and flexibility of Sophisticated Storage into the moving world of Create, so your storage blocks can now travel on trains, rotating platforms, flying machines, and more — without losing any of their advanced capabilities.

![Sophisticated Storage on Create contraptions](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cf10b3d8-ab73-4ea4-b92a-8e20f3f2856b)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/810643286511190016?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/ZNxRYScDS7)    [![Twitter Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=000000&label=Twitter&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://x.com/P3pp3rF1y)    [![GitHub Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=000000&label=GitHub&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://github.com/P3pp3rF1y)    [![Ko-Fi Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&label=Ko-Fi&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://ko-fi.com/p3pp3rf1y)
### Contraption Storage
All Sophisticated Storage blocks - barrels, chests, and shulker boxes - can now be mounted on Create contraptions and will maintain full compatibility while in motion. Storage content remains persistent across movement, and upgrades, upgrade settings, and inventory settings (like memorized slots) are retained.

### Upgrades
Most upgrades from Sophisticated Storage work seamlessly on Create contraptions. Position-based upgrades like Pickup or Magnet use the contraption's dynamic position and the position of the actual storage to function at the correct position, stack upgrades expand slot capacity, crafting upgrade works with contents of the storage, ...
Upgrades can be added to vehicle storage by right clicking them on the contraption mounted storage directly in the world.

### Tier Upgrades
Tier upgrades can be applied to contraption storages the same way as to regular ones by just right clicking these on the storage. This allows for easy expansion of storage capacity even when the contraption is on the move.

### Storage Tool
The Storage Tool can be used directly on contraptions to manage lock settings and visual indicators such as tier, upgrade slots, and fill levels—just like with any regular Sophisticated Storage block.

### Paintbrush
Paintbrush can paint the contraption storages with the same level of support as it can regular storages so both tints as well as barrel materials changing with paintbrush are supported.
